title: Stichorkis indifferens
taxonomy: Stichorkis indifferens belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the genus Stichorkis. It is a species of orchid, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid. The classification further breaks down into the tribe Coelogyneae and subtribe Coelogyninae. This species is native to Southeast Asia, particularly in countries such as India and Myanmar. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification within the subtribe.
uses: Unfortunately, I don't have information about the medicinal uses of Stichorkis indifferens.
constituents: Unfortunately, I don't have information on the active constituents of Stichorkis indifferens.
